title: inspect
description: Domain verb: read tensor data at a probe point without modifying model state. Method name: 'rocket/inspect'.

target.description: Probe-point pattern identifying what to inspect (e.g. 'llama:0:12:attn.o_proj:output').

detail.description: Level of detail to return. 'summary' returns stats only, 'slice' returns a sub-range of raw bytes, 'full' returns the entire tensor.

slices.description: Array of [start, end] pairs defining the slice ranges. Only meaningful when detail is 'slice'.

format.description: Desired dtype for returned slice data. Server casts if needed. Only meaningful when detail is 'slice'.

Response.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 result for 'rocket/inspect'. State status will be 'stopped' on success.

tensors.description: One TensorSummary per matched probe point.

view_result.description: Result of the built-in interpretability view, if one was requested. Structure depends on the view type. Null if no view was requested.

slice_data.description: Base64-encoded raw bytes of the requested tensor slice. Null unless detail was 'slice' or 'full'.
